People with braces cannot manipulate gravity at will because the presence of braces does not alter the fundamental laws of physics that govern gravitational forces. Braces are orthodontic devices designed to correct misalignments in teeth and jaws, and they have no effect on a person's ability to interact with or control gravity. The idea of manipulating gravity at will is currently beyond the realm of human capability and is not supported by any scientific evidence. This limitation is a universal human weakness.
